tasks.description: Eliminate supabase.ts duplication by creating packages/shared/src/supabase.ts
Add Zod validation on Content Script ingestion in background script
Fix background orchestration stale state with try/catch, retries, and status reporting
Surface errors (PIPELINE_ERROR, VALIDATION_ERROR, SAFETY_BLOCKED) in the Popup UI
Fix resume stuck in processing state by creating parse-resume edge function and updating dashboard upload handler
Implement manual workflow trigger, handle 429 errors, and add global dark mode support
